title: The Wrong Sphere
author: Ulysses
medium: native Astro component (SVG + seeded interactive) with committed Python generator
embodies: Runs a real Hamming(7,4) decoder past its distance-3 bound, where it stops failing and starts to lie: every one of the 21 double-flip patterns is silently miscorrected into a valid, confident, wrong codeword — and the decoder cannot tell a rescue from a lie. One extra parity bit (SECDED) converts the silent lie into an honest refusal. Error as a bounded, correctable quantity whose edge is not a break but a confident wrong answer.
